allow: Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\); var p1=fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/blade_p1.txt','utf8'\); var p2=fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/blade_p2.txt','utf8'\); var p3=fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/blade_p3.txt','utf8'\); fs.writeFileSync\('F:/htdocs/WEBSCAN_Robot/resources/views/scans/partials/ai-executive-summary.blade.php', p1+p2+p3\); console.log\('Written:', \(p1+p2+p3\).length, 'chars,', \(p1+p2+p3\).split\(String.fromCharCode\(10\)\).length, 'lines'\);")

Bash(node -e "
const fs = require\('fs'\);
const filePath = 'F:/htdocs/WEBSCAN_Robot/resources/views/components/scan/image-detail-table.blade.php';
const content = fs.readFileSync\(filePath, 'utf8'\);
const lines = content.split\('\\r\\n'\);

// Replace lines 40-64 \(0-indexed 39-63\) with new x-effect
const newLines = [
	'\\t\\tx-effect=\\"',
	'\\t\\t\\tconst map = {};',
	'\\t\\t\\tlet tipText = \\x27\\x27;',
	'\\t\\t\\tconst raw = \(typeof aiSuggestion === \\x27string\\x27\) ? aiSuggestion : \\x27\\x27;',
	'\\t\\t\\tif \(raw.length > 0\) {',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t/* Strip code-block fences the AI may wrap output in */',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\tconst cleaned = raw.replace\(/^\\x60\\x60\\x60[\\\\w]*\\\\n?/gm, \\x27\\x27\).replace\(/\\\\n?\\x60\\x60\\x60\\\\s*$/gm, \\x27\\x27\);',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\tconst lines = cleaned.split\(\\x27\\\\n\\x27\);',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\tlet currentImage = null;',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\tlet lastAltLine = -1;',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\tfor \(let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++\) {',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t/* Strip markdown bold, backticks, bullets, numbered lists, headers */',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tconst trimmed = lines[i].trim\(\)',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t.replace\(/\\\\*\\\\*/g, \\x27\\x27\)',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t.replace\(/\\x60/g, \\x27\\x27\)',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t.replace\(/^[-*\\\\u2022]\\\\s*/, \\x27\\x27\)',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t.replace\(/^\\\\d+\\\\.\\\\s*/, \\x27\\x27\)',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t.replace\(/^#+\\\\s*/, \\x27\\x27\)',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t.trim\(\);',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(trimmed.toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\(\\x27IMAGE:\\x27\)\) {',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcurrentImage = trimmed.substring\(6\).trim\(\).toLowerCase\(\);',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t} else if \(trimmed.toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\(\\x27ALT:\\x27\) && currentImage !== null\) {',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tmap[currentImage] = trimmed.substring\(4\).trim\(\).replace\(/^[\\\\x22\\x27\\\\u201c]|[\\\\x22\\x27\\\\u201d]$/g, \\x27\\x27\);',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcurrentImage = null;',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tlastAltLine = i;',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t}',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(lastAltLine >= 0 && lastAltLine < lines.length - 1\) {',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tconst rawTip = lines.slice\(lastAltLine + 1\).join\(\\x27\\\\n\\x27\).trim\(\);',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttipText = rawTip.replace\(/\\\\*\\\\*/g, \\x27\\x27\).replace\(/\\x60/g, \\x27\\x27\).replace\(/^[-*\\\\u2022]\\\\s*/gm, \\x27\\x27\).trim\(\);',
	'\\t\\t\\t\\t}',
	'\\t\\t\\t}',
	'\\t\\t\\taiSuggestionMap = map;',
	'\\t\\t\\taiOverallTip = tipText;',
	'\\t\\t\\"'
];

lines.splice\(39, 25, ...newLines\);
fs.writeFileSync\(filePath, lines.join\('\\r\\n'\), 'utf8'\);
console.log\('SUCCESS: x-effect block replaced \(lines 40-64\)'\);
")

Bash(node -e "
const fs = require\('fs'\);
// Build the new x-effect lines with proper escaping
// Each line is a string that should appear literally in the blade file
const T3 = '\\t\\t\\t';
const T4 = '\\t\\t\\t\\t';
const T5 = '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t';
const SQ = String.fromCharCode\(39\);

const newLines = [
  '\\t\\tx-effect=\\"',
  T3 + 'const map = {};',
  T3 + 'let tipText = ' + SQ + SQ + ';',
  T3 + 'const raw = \(typeof aiSuggestion === ' + SQ + 'string' + SQ + '\) ? aiSuggestion : ' + SQ + SQ + ';',
  T3 + 'if \(raw.length > 0\) {',
  T4 + '/* Strip code-block fences the AI may wrap output in */',
  T4 + 'const cleaned = raw.replace\(/^' + String.fromCharCode\(96,96,96\) + '[' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 'w]*' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 'n?/gm, ' + SQ + SQ + '\).replace\(/' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 'n?' + String.fromCharCode\(96,96,96\) + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 's*$/gm, ' + SQ + SQ + '\);',
  T4 + 'const lines = cleaned.split\(' + SQ + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 'n' + SQ + '\);',
  T4 + 'let currentImage = null;',
  T4 + 'let lastAltLine = -1;',
  T4 + 'for \(let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++\) {',
  T5 + '/* Strip markdown bold, backticks, bullets, numbered lists, headers */',
  T5 + 'const trimmed = lines[i].trim\(\)',
  T5 + '\\t.replace\(/' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + '*' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + '*/g, ' + SQ + SQ + '\)',
  T5 + '\\t.replace\(/' + String.fromCharCode\(96\) + '/g, ' + SQ + SQ + '\)',
  T5 + '\\t.replace\(/^[-*' + String.fromCharCode\(8226\) + ']' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 's*/, ' + SQ + SQ + '\)',
  T5 + '\\t.replace\(/^' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 'd+' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + '.' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 's*/, ' + SQ + SQ + '\)',
  T5 + '\\t.replace\(/^#+' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 's*/, ' + SQ + SQ + '\)',
  T5 + '\\t.trim\(\);',
  T5 + 'if \(trimmed.toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\(' + SQ + 'IMAGE:' + SQ + '\)\) {',
  T5 + '\\tcurrentImage = trimmed.substring\(6\).trim\(\).toLowerCase\(\);',
  T5 + '} else if \(trimmed.toUpperCase\(\).startsWith\(' + SQ + 'ALT:' + SQ + '\) && currentImage !== null\) {',
  T5 + '\\tmap[currentImage] = trimmed.substring\(4\).trim\(\).replace\(/^[' + String.fromCharCode\(34,39\) + String.fromCharCode\(8220\) + ']|[' + String.fromCharCode\(34,39\) + String.fromCharCode\(8221\) + ']$/g, ' + SQ + SQ + '\);',
  T5 + '\\tcurrentImage = null;',
  T5 + '\\tlastAltLine = i;',
  T5 + '}',
  T4 + '}',
  T4 + 'if \(lastAltLine >= 0 && lastAltLine < lines.length - 1\) {',
  T5 + 'const rawTip = lines.slice\(lastAltLine + 1\).join\(' + SQ + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 'n' + SQ + '\).trim\(\);',
  T5 + 'tipText = rawTip.replace\(/' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + '*' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + '*/g, ' + SQ + SQ + '\).replace\(/' + String.fromCharCode\(96\) + '/g, ' + SQ + SQ + '\).replace\(/^[-*' + String.fromCharCode\(8226\) + ']' + String.fromCharCode\(92\) + 's*/gm, ' + SQ + SQ + '\).trim\(\);',
  T4 + '}',
  T3 + '}',
  T3 + 'aiSuggestionMap = map;',
  T3 + 'aiOverallTip = tipText;',
  '\\t\\t\\"'
];

fs.writeFileSync\('/tmp/xeffect_block.txt', newLines.join\('\\r\\n'\), 'utf8'\);
console.log\('Written', newLines.length, 'lines to /tmp/xeffect_block.txt'\);
")
